name: Sauteed Brook Trout with Orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the fish briefly in milk in a flat pan.
2. In another pan, season flour with salt and pepper.
3. Remove trout from milk and dredge fillets in flour, shaking off excess.
4. Sauté trout in olive oil over medium-high heat in a heavy skillet for 2-3 minutes per side until cooked through. Remove and keep warm.
5. Drain any excess fat from the skillet.
6. Clean leeks and slice into 1/4-inch rings (including some green section). Place orange sections, leeks, and thyme in the skillet and toss briefly to warm through. Ensure leeks do not brown.
7. Stir in lemon juice, vodka, and softened butter. Reduce heat and blend well.
8. Serve sautéed trout on plates with sauce divided over fish portions. Garnish with fresh basil or parsley.
